description:
You are an education administrator setting up the daily class period schedule for Demo School in OpenSIS (Username: `admin`, Password: `Admin@123`). 

Add the following 7 periods to the school schedule:

| Sort Order | Title      | Short Name | Length |
|------------|------------|------------|--------|
| 1          | Period 1   | P1         | 55     |
| 2          | Period 2   | P2         | 55     |
| 3          | Period 3   | P3         | 55     |
| 4          | Lunch      | LN         | 30     |
| 5          | Period 4   | P4         | 55     |
| 6          | Period 5   | P5         | 55     |
| 7          | Period 6   | P6         | 55     |

Ensure all periods are correctly saved and visible in the schedule list.
